variants.name: Roundtable Debate

variants.scene: a giant evidence board with pinned photos, suspect notes, and case documents, four characters actively briefing each other, one pins a clue onto the board, one turns to argue a theory, one crosses arms and responds, one holds files and leans forward, dramatic side light, strong depth, investigation room atmosphere

variants.name: Velvet Salon Conference

variants.name: Secret Library Strategy
